description: Learn how to make a basic omelet, including ingredient preparation and cooking techniques.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients: eggs, salt, pepper, and butter.
Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them until well combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add butter.
Pour the whisked eggs into the skillet and let them cook for a minute.
Gently stir the eggs with a spatula, allowing uncooked eggs to flow to the edges.
Once the eggs are mostly set, fold the omelet in half and cook for another minute.
Slide the omelet onto a plate, season with salt and pepper, and enjoy!

safety_notes: Be careful when handling hot pans.
Ensure eggs are cooked thoroughly to avoid foodborne illness.
